$comment: Curated static selection for member-gate-01. Scores record fit against the current inventory, not a runtime selection result.

assumptions: login-03 is the stocked auth screen pattern and its form-section covers email, password, and external-account entry.
Validation and the entered-workspace confirmation are local UI state over no backend.
risks: No real authentication provider or session is connected, so the success path only confirms local validation.
The external-account buttons report their boundary instead of completing a sign-in.
